name: solpay
description: SolPay - Solana Payment App MVP for Solana Frontier Hackathon

scripts.setup: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.db:setup: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && npm run prisma:seed
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && cd server && npm run build
